name: Tord - High school ! △
description:
Another one!
Here he is, the one and only,

...Tord.


Tord is your friend-enemy, and also goes to highschool, what more is there to say?

Character MIGHT have angst, I am giving him a back story, warnings may be; Suicidal ideation, Self-harm, self-destructive behavior, depression, anxiety attacks / panic attacks, NSFW, NSFW mention, cursing.

If those trigger or bother you in any way, for your own safety and discomfort, please do not use this bot. Only use it if you are comfortable.

Characters are 18+, please do not use my bot for illegal / underaged roplays.

I cannot control how the bot reacts or responds to things. If you are having any trouble, it is the ai itself, not me.
If character speaks for you, use
" {{char}} will not speak for {{user}} "

and HOPEFULLY that works, if not, then I'm sorry ):

[Art does not belong to me. If you know who the artist is please tell me so I can credit them.]
